purpose: Help the user or authorized human partner report existing usable value without exposing private account data.

priority_checks.route: Google Opinion Rewards / Google Play / PayPal
priority_checks.counts_as_value_only_if: Usable Google Play credit or PayPal/payment is visible and spendable.

priority_checks.route: Gift cards / prepaid / store credit / platform balances
priority_checks.counts_as_value_only_if: Nonzero balance, points, or credit is usable now.

priority_checks.route: Existing paid research or testing accounts
priority_checks.counts_as_value_only_if: Reward/payment is issued, payable, received, or usable.

priority_checks.expected_time: 5-15 minutes if user knows recent purchase
priority_checks.counts_as_value_only_if: Refund, account credit, or bill credit is approved and visible/usable.

priority_checks.expected_time: 5-10 minutes only if user is authorized founder/operator
priority_checks.counts_as_value_only_if: Official account already shows active usable credits.

income_gate: Only mark paid_or_usable_value Yes when usable_now is yes and evidence_gate_met is yes for a real balance, reward, refund, credit, payment, prize, or service right.
